title: ranunculus pilicauliformis
intro: Ranunculus pilicauliformis, also known as Himalayan buttercup, is a species of flowering plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus pilicauliformis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. It can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for external use, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
